description: Theme parks, escape rooms, exploring new towns, and boundary-pushing experiences.

ideas.title: Escape Room Challenge
ideas.description: Book a themed escape room for two and race against the clock to solve puzzles, crack codes, and find your way out. The shared pressure of a ticking countdown creates an electric atmosphere, and the debrief afterward — replaying every decision — is often as fun as the room itself. Book weekday evenings for better pricing and smaller crowds.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_01] Two cartoon characters inside a vividly themed escape room, one urgently pointing at a wall of cryptic clues and coded locks while the other scribbles furiously on a notepad. A large glowing red countdown timer dominates the upper wall. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Random Location Road Trip
ideas.description: Open a map, close your eyes, point to a driveable spot you've never been, and go — no itinerary, no hotel booked in advance, just snacks and an open day. Explore whatever town you land in: the diner, the weird museum, the local park. It's either your new favorite town or a great story either way.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_02] Two cartoon characters in a car on an open road, one holding a map with eyes dramatically closed while pointing at a random destination. Dashboard snacks are everywhere and the road stretches ahead into colorful unknown countryside. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Amusement Park Full Day
ideas.description: Spend a full day at a regional amusement or theme park, riding the biggest coasters first while your nerves are still fresh. Let yourselves be completely childlike — funnel cake, carnival games, and screaming on drops together. The shared adrenaline release and physical closeness on rides creates a powerful bonding cocktail.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_03] Two cartoon characters at the peak of a roller coaster drop — arms up, mouths wide open in identical screams, hair flying horizontally. A funnel cake bag is clutched in one hand as the theme park spreads colorfully far below. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Indoor Skydiving Experience
ideas.description: Book a session at an indoor skydiving wind tunnel facility where instructors teach you to float and maneuver in a vertical column of air. It requires zero experience, lasts about 60 minutes total, and delivers the sensation of freefall without the altitude. Watch each other's faces light up — it's impossible to look cool, and that's the point.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_04] Two cartoon characters in colorful flight suits floating inside a vertical wind tunnel, arms and legs spread wide as instructors guide them through the air. A massive roaring fan is visible below and viewing windows show cheering onlookers outside. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: High Ropes Obstacle Course
ideas.description: Book an aerial adventure park where you both clip into harnesses and navigate rope bridges, zip lines, and climbing elements through a tree canopy. The height alone is thrilling, but working together to encourage each other through scary sections reveals a lot about how you operate as a team under pressure.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_05] Two cartoon characters high in a tree canopy on a wobbly rope bridge, safety harnesses clipped to the line. One reaches back to encourage the other across a particularly terrifying gap. The forest floor is a dizzying distance below. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Go-Kart Racing Night
ideas.description: Head to an indoor or outdoor go-kart track and challenge each other to beat the other's lap time. Most tracks offer multi-race packages with timing systems so you can track each other's splits. The friendly trash-talking, post-race analysis, and competitive energy make this one of the most unexpectedly fun date formats.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_06] Two cartoon characters in racing helmets leaning hard into a sharp turn on an indoor go-kart track, karts nearly touching side by side. A digital lap-time scoreboard displays their split times and a checkered flag hangs at the finish line ahead. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Ghost Tour of Your City
ideas.description: Book a guided ghost tour of your city's most historically haunted locations — these typically run 90 minutes and cover actual documented legends tied to real buildings and sites. The combination of local history, darkness, and supernatural storytelling creates a surprisingly intimate shared experience.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_07] Two cartoon characters on a dark cobblestone street at night, a lantern-carrying tour guide in Victorian costume leading them past a spooky historic building. Eerie ghost silhouettes glow in the upper windows above them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: VR Arcade Adventure
ideas.description: Visit a virtual reality arcade and work through co-op experiences together — from zombie survival and escape room VR to space exploration and rhythm games. Trading headsets after each round and watching each other react to virtual scenarios is genuinely hilarious. Most sessions last 1–2 hours with unlimited game switching.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_08] Two cartoon characters in VR headsets at an arcade, arms flailing wildly in different directions. Their VR screens show a chaotic zombie survival scene. Other glowing arcade machines fill the colorful background. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Murder Mystery Dinner Show
ideas.description: Buy tickets to an interactive murder mystery dinner experience where the cast performs around your table and you're asked to solve the crime by the end of the night. Come dressed for the era, play along with the characters, and debate your theories between courses. Theatrical, unpredictable, and endlessly entertaining.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_09] Two cartoon characters in period costumes at a dinner table during a murder mystery show, leaning conspiratorially over a large clue card while costumed actors perform a dramatic scene beside them. A 'Suspect Board' is mounted on the wall behind them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Axe Throwing Date Night
ideas.description: Book a lane at an axe throwing venue — most offer 60–90 minute sessions with coaching and unlimited throws included. There's no experience required and the learning curve is steep enough to keep you both focused. Challenge each other to targets and let the winner pick the restaurant for dinner after.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: thrill_10] A cartoon character in mid-throw releasing an axe toward a colorful wooden target, while their partner stands safely behind the throwing line keeping a dramatic score tally on a chalkboard. Several axes are already embedded in the rings of the target. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition.
